description: Maps every guard token and every load-bearing action verb in transitions.json to a code anchor: a named function (asserted DEFINED via `^<name>\(\)` in the cited file) or a greppable predicate string (asserted PRESENT in the cited file). scripts/check-spec-drift.sh fails when (a) a transitions.json guard/action token has no entry here, or (b) a mapped anchor no longer resolves in its file (code drifted out from under the spec). Anchors key on function names and grep-stable literals — NEVER line numbers (line numbers drift on every edit). The `comment:*` action verbs are documentation-only (the posted comment text varies and is specified in state-machine.md / *-flow.md), so they are EXEMPT from a code anchor — the checker only requires they be the known `comment:` verb class. file paths are relative to skills/autonomous-dispatcher/scripts/.

only-autonomous-label.note: list_new_issues jq filter excludes any other state label (#371 W1a: re-derived over the normalized itp_list_by_state labels array).

concurrency-below-cap.name: count_active
concurrency-below-cap.note: Active count compared to MAX_CONCURRENT in dispatcher-tick.sh.

wrapper-exit-zero.note: cleanup() success branch keys on exit_code==0.

pr-exists-for-issue.name: fetch_pr_for_issue
pr-exists-for-issue.note: PR discovery by issue-ref in PR body.

no-pr-for-issue.name: fetch_pr_for_issue
no-pr-for-issue.note: Empty result of the same discovery.

pid-alive.name: pid_alive
pid-alive.note: Tiered liveness incl. SSM indeterminate (biases ALIVE).

pid-dead.name: pid_alive
pid-dead.note: DEAD = pid_alive miss; gated by INV-24 near-success+heartbeat.

ci-all-success.note: Step 5a requires all PR checks SUCCESS.

head-differs-from-reviewed.name: last_reviewed_head
head-differs-from-reviewed.note: Step 5b new-commits check vs Reviewed HEAD trailer (INV-04/07).

sigterm-wrapper-no-pr.note: SIGTERM trap; no-PR path routes pending-dev (INV-15).

verdict-fail-nonsubstantive.name: classify_recent_review_verdict
verdict-fail-nonsubstantive.note: INV-35 non-substantive cause (mergeable-unknown / e2e-evidence-missing / smoke-config-error / unavailable).

verdict-none.name: classify_recent_review_verdict
verdict-none.note: INV-123: no qualifying review comment found at all — branches on PR existence (dispatch-review-aware-none-nopr-fresh-dev vs. the unchanged INV-12-completed handoff, not a transition).

no-auto-close-absent.note: Same label read; absence allows auto-merge.

pr-merge-failed.note: gh pr merge returned non-zero → rebase re-dispatch (INV-33).

e2e-gate-fail.name: _classify_e2e_gate
e2e-gate-fail.note: INV-46: E2E lane rc≠0 before fan-out.

e2e-evidence-missing.name: _classify_e2e_gate
e2e-evidence-missing.note: INV-46: rc=0 but no SHA-matching evidence (transient).

same-head-same-rc-threshold-reached.name: _gate_breaker_next_count
same-head-same-rc-threshold-reached.note: INV-122 (#453): the fingerprint is (head_sha, e2e_lane_rc), not head alone — a different rc on the same head resets the counter (_gate_breaker_next_count returns 1) rather than accumulating it. The same-HEAD E2E-gate circuit breaker's primary trip signal, mirroring INV-105's convergence-threshold-reached for a different trigger.

not-already-stalled.note: INV-122 (#453): checked before the trip condition so the breaker never re-trips or posts a competing report when the issue is already stalled (e.g. INV-105 tripped first).

review-round-cap-threshold-reached.name: _review_cap_next_count
review-round-cap-threshold-reached.note: INV-127 (#449): the counter is head-AGNOSTIC (accumulates across consecutive failed-substantive rounds regardless of head changes) — deliberately distinct from INV-122's head-scoped _gate_breaker_next_count, since this breaker's motivating case has a NEW head every round.

smoke-config-error.name: _classify_smoke_gate
smoke-config-error.note: INV-64: pre-fan-out smoke FAIL = config error, stays reviewing.

bot-review-missing.note: INV-79: a mandatory configured REVIEW_BOTS review is still absent on the PR (fail-closed: a gh failure counts the bot as MISSING).

bot-review-wait-below-max.note: INV-79: the SHA-bound bot-review wait count is below BOT_REVIEW_WAIT_MAX → re-queue pending-review (non-substantive).

bot-review-wait-exceeded.note: INV-79: the SHA-bound bot-review wait count reached BOT_REVIEW_WAIT_MAX → substantive FAIL pending-dev (bot misconfigured/down).

pr-still-open.note: INV-54: hoisted PR-open guard, proceed branch.

ci-rollup-head-changed.note: INV-134: chp_pr_view headRefOid vs the reviewed PR_HEAD_SHA mismatch, checked before AND after the chp_ci_rollup call — never approves against a stale HEAD.

ci-rollup-pending-below-max.name: _ci_rollup_wait_max
ci-rollup-pending-below-max.note: INV-134: token=pending/leaf-rc≠0, SHA-bound wait count below CI_ROLLUP_WAIT_MAX → re-queue pending-review (non-substantive).

ci-rollup-pending-exceeded.name: _ci_rollup_wait_max
ci-rollup-pending-exceeded.note: INV-134: SHA-bound wait count reached CI_ROLLUP_WAIT_MAX → substantive FAIL pending-dev (check stuck/misconfigured).

result-not-parsed.note: Crash trap fires only when RESULT_PARSED=false.

still-reviewing.note: Step 5b confirms the issue still carries reviewing.

session-resumable.name: is_session_completed
session-resumable.note: INV-12: resume only against unfinished sessions.

same-head-reviewed-failed.name: last_reviewed_head
same-head-reviewed-failed.note: INV-111 layer 3: handle_pending_dev_pr_exists's same-HEAD branch (current PR headRefOid == last Reviewed HEAD trailer) — the prior verdict was FAILED, same gate INV-98 uses.

no-session-id-resolvable.name: extract_dev_session_id
no-session-id-resolvable.note: INV-111 layer 3: an empty return is the signature of a lost Dev Session ID / session-report comment (e.g. an auth-shim teardown race mid-cleanup, #402).

no-live-dev-wrapper.name: may_stall_now
no-live-dev-wrapper.note: INV-111 layer 3: the shared INV-24/INV-26-style pid_alive-miss + no-fresh-dispatch-marker liveness predicate — a live wrapper defers self-heal.

session-id-resolvable.name: extract_dev_session_id
session-id-resolvable.note: INV-125 (#466): a NON-empty return — the disjoint precondition from no-session-id-resolvable. A session id DID resolve, but its completion could not be confirmed (see session-completion-unprovable).

session-completion-unprovable.name: is_session_completed
session-completion-unprovable.note: INV-125 (#466): a false return with a resolved session id — a non-terminal stop reason (e.g. api_error), a non-claude dev CLI (claude-only by design), or an unreadable/missing session log. NOT a 'the session crashed' determination — completion is merely unprovable.

review-flips-at-limit.note: INV-35: non-substantive flip count ≥ limit → stalled.

dev-no-progress-or-bot-unfixable.name: dev_report_bot_unfixable
dev-no-progress-or-bot-unfixable.note: INV-85: completed-session failed-substantive escalates to stalled when the PR HEAD is unchanged since the last review AND a prior dev-new already ran for it (no-progress, gated by the no-progress-substantive-attempt marker), OR the dev agent hit a PR-metadata 403 (dev_report_bot_unfixable). Bounded to one dev-new per HEAD.

convergence-threshold-reached.name: count_frozen_convergence_rounds
convergence-threshold-reached.note: INV-105 (#297): >=CONVERGENCE_STALL_THRESHOLD (default 3) completed zero-commit dev-resume rounds counted for the ACTIVE {head, trailer} case only (each round joined to its preceding review-verdict trailer; a round whose trailer canonical differs from the active case's, e.g. a #298 dev-actionable=false or a stale non-substantive round, is excluded). The convergence circuit-breaker's primary trip signal.

terminal-with-transitional-residue.name: hygiene_strip_residual_labels
terminal-with-transitional-residue.note: INV-25: Step 0 hygiene strips residue on terminal issues.

liveness-not-already-stalled.note: INV-128 (#467): checked immediately before the tier-2 transition so the watchdog never re-trips or posts a competing report when a specific breaker (e.g. INV-105/INV-122) already stalled the issue — mirrors INV-122's own not-already-stalled gate.

liveness-fingerprint-frozen-at-stall-thr.name: _liveness_tier_action
liveness-fingerprint-frozen-at-stall-thr.note: INV-128 (#467): the pure decision function — count >= LIVENESS_STALL_TICKS (default 18) consecutive unchanged-fingerprint ticks yields the tier2 action. The class-level backstop's primary trip signal.

sigterm-wrapper.note: Step 5a sends SIGTERM to the wrapper PID before relabel.
